article_meta.title: 4 Republicans defy Speaker Johnson to force House vote on extending ACA subsidies The Associated PressAP17 Dec 2025 Four

reasoning: Mixed performance: some genuine author-prose bias spotted (e.g., 'centrist', 'stunning move', 'soaring', 'assailed') but labels are mostly non-conforming to the allowed set, one item improperly targets a paraphrased source characterization, and a meta claim about source selection lacks a concrete text excerpt. Several clear author-level instances (e.g., 'revolt', 'magic number of 218') were missed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Item 3 flags a phrase that includes a paraphrased source characterization ('failed marketplace'), edging into attributed content rather than purely author voice.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Item 4 asserts source-selection imbalance without a specific excerpt and overlooks multiple conservative quotes; overreach. Other items are defensible.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-level loaded terms like 'revolt' (subhead) and 'magic number of 218', and potentially 'defy' in the headline.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories ('Labeling Bias', 'Selection and Omission Bias', 'Source Selection Bias', 'Spin/Word Choice Bias') instead of the defined set (e.g., Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Spin, Word Choice, Bias by Omission).
